game_info.title: Slay-In-Finite
game_info.concept:
PREPARE FOR THE WORLD’S FIRST ENDLESS ACTION RPG

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/slayin/id548580856

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

PREPARE FOR THE WORLD’S FIRST ENDLESS ACTION RPG

Slayin will test your skills like no other endless game on the App Store. Don’t get yourself fooled by its charming retro graphics and motivating chiptune soundtrack. In this game, death lurks behind every corner!

Your task sounds all so simple. First choose from one of three heroes: knight, wizard and knave. Then slay as many monsters as possible, while leveling up and getting more powerful equipment and spells along the way. But there’s a catch: once you die, you’re gone for good!

On your journey you will travel through numerous locations and encounter dozens  of different monsters and fearsome bosses. Eventually, you will even have to face the giant dragon of legend. But he will not part with his treasure easily. Only the most worthy adventurers will be able to complete this task and become a true hero. Get ready for some slayin!

• World’s first endless action RPG
• Challenging and rewarding
• Pixel perfect retro graphics
• Chiptune soundtrack by Matt Creamer (Retro City Rampage)
• 6 unique playable classes: knight, wizard, knave, archer, tamer and ninja
• Endless loot: tons of weapons, armor and spells
• Face legendary monsters and bosses
• More than a hundred challenging quests to master
• 3 unique game modes
• Compete with your friends on Game Center
game_info.description:
Welcome to SLAY-IN-FINITE! You are a legendary hero in an endless arena of doom.

Your goal is simple: Survive as long as possible, slay endless waves of monsters, and collect their loot to level up.
As you defeat enemies, you gain experience and gold. Leveling up increases your stats and heals you.
Face unique enemies like Slimes, Bats, and Skeleton Warriors, and prepare for the fearsome Minotaur Boss!

Watch your health, time your attacks, and don't let them corner you. Death is permanent!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move hero
Space: Jump
Z: Attack (Swing Sword)
Shift: Dash / Dodge
Esc: Pause / Unpause
Enter: Start Game
R: Restart Game (on Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify core movement and jump mechanics responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate Left/Right inputs to move the player and Space to jump. It checks if position changes and vertical velocity responds to jump input.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player coordinates change according to input. Player Y position decreases (goes up) when Jump is pressed. Player lands back on ground.
TEST_1.description: Verify core movement and jump mechanics responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy: The test will simulate Left/Right inputs to move the player and Space to jump. It checks if position changes and vertical velocity responds to jump input.
TEST_1.expected: Player coordinates change according to input. Player Y position decreases (goes up) when Jump is pressed. Player lands back on ground.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify combat system and enemy collision.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The player will move towards the nearest enemy and press 'Z' to attack when in range. It tracks enemy health.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Weapon hitbox activates. Enemy takes damage and eventually dies (is removed from entity list). Score increases.
TEST_2.description: Verify combat system and enemy collision.
TEST_2.strategy: The player will move towards the nearest enemy and press 'Z' to attack when in range. It tracks enemy health.
TEST_2.expected: Weapon hitbox activates. Enemy takes damage and eventually dies (is removed from entity list). Score increases.

test_2_ModeBtn.description: Verify combat system and enemy collision.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify loot collection and leveling system.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The player will navigate to collectible items (Loot) spawned after enemy death. It tracks XP and Level.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Loot entity is removed upon collision. Player XP increases. If XP threshold met, Player Level increases and Max HP increases.
TEST_3.description: Verify loot collection and leveling system.
TEST_3.strategy: The player will navigate to collectible items (Loot) spawned after enemy death. It tracks XP and Level.
TEST_3.expected: Loot entity is removed upon collision. Player XP increases. If XP threshold met, Player Level increases and Max HP increases.

TEST_4.strategy_description: The player will stand still and let enemies attack until health reaches zero.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player Health reaches 0. Game Phase changes to GAME_OVER_LOSE. High score is updated.

TEST_4.expected: Player Health reaches 0. Game Phase changes to GAME_OVER_LOSE. High score is updated.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Press ESC key during gameplay. Wait a few frames. Press ESC again.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game Phase becomes PAUSED. Updates (physics/enemies) stop. After second ESC, phase becomes PLAYING.
TEST_5.strategy: Press ESC key during gameplay. Wait a few frames. Press ESC again.
TEST_5.expected: Game Phase becomes PAUSED. Updates (physics/enemies) stop. After second ESC, phase becomes PLAYING.
